title: HYDGEN and Spectronik Partner to Enable Decentralized Green Hydrogen Infrastructure for Fuel Cell Mobility
content: HYDGENÂ (Hydrogen Innovation Pte Ltd), a leading manufacturer of scalable green hydrogen electrolyzers, andÂ SpectronikÂ Pte Ltd, a pioneer in fuel cell systems for mobility applications, have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to advance decentralized hydrogen solutions for fuel cell-powered transportation in Southeast Asia. Under this new partnership, Spectronik will deploy HYDGENâ€™s modular electrolyzers to generate high-purity green hydrogen directly at its fuel cell demonstration sites.
author: Analysts Account
